title: Replace Home page hero single image with an animated hero asset

requirements.text: Replace the static Home page hero image (`/assets/sioj.png`) with an animated hero asset on the Home page hero section, so the homepage shows an animation instead of a single picture.

quotes: please insert animation instead of single picture in the homepage

acceptanceCriteria: Home page hero no longer renders the static image at `src="/assets/sioj.png"`.
Home page hero renders a looping animated asset (served as a local static file from `frontend/public/assets/generated`).
Animation is lightweight (loads quickly) and does not break layout on mobile or desktop.
Animated hero respects reduced-motion preferences (if the user has `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`, show a non-animated fallback).

requirements.text: Add the new animated hero asset to the project as a local static file under `frontend/public/assets/generated` and update the Home page to reference it.

quotes: please insert animation instead of single picture in the homepage

acceptanceCriteria: A new animated hero file exists under `frontend/public/assets/generated` using the filename specified in this build request’s image requirements.
`frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx` references the new generated animated asset path (not a remote URL).

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`, `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx`, `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, `frontend/src/main.tsx`, and anything under `frontend/src/components/ui`.
Do not add any new backend functionality for this change (hero animation must be served as a static frontend asset).
nonGoals: Adding sound effects or audio to the homepage animation.
Changing homepage copy or navigation beyond what is required to swap the hero media.

required: Looping kid-friendly hero animation illustration, bright and playful, wide landscape composition (home-hero-animated.dim_1400x900.gif)
